title: Actually Glass
description: Make the glass look fancy and vibrant
body:
# 🏠 Make your windows look fancy

This is the simplest resourcepack that just applies _fancy_ textures to _glass_ and glass panes.
Now the glass perfectly fits with _medieval-themed_ builds and other structures, enjoy!

Shaders are supported!
![Shader support: colored shadows and reflections](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad950343b6fa07b33f7a26ae96a021d942a2618_0.webp)

And that's my first texturepack 😅
